description: Style NoteThis fastrack watch gets a new season update in its styling and design details. For maximum impact, style this with your off-duty staples and throw on a few tonal accessories for added measure. This zingy time piece is sure to give a face-lift to your summer wardrobe!Product DetailsCase style:  Analog watch with steel irregular rectangular caseDial style: Black dial with black and white hands Strap style: Black genuine leather strap with a tang claspFeatures: Date apeture on the 12 hour mark and branding on the dialWater resistant 50 M that can be used around sinks and rain splashesWarranty: 1 yearSizeCase diameter: 27 mmCase thickness: 10 mm
